changes.title: 新增
items: Unity 插件安装包改为内置合并后的 Roslyn 运行组件，减少项目内依赖冲突。

changes.title: 修复
items: 修复部分 Unity 项目安装插件后出现 Roslyn 相关编译冲突的问题。
修复应用更新后 Unity 插件资源可能沿用旧文件的问题。
修复 Unity 嵌入窗口在父窗口隐藏、切换或恢复时仍可能显示的问题。
修复 Unity Editor 快速发送窗口同步消息时偶发连接到旧控制通道的问题。
Diff 预览会忽略仅由 Windows/macOS 行尾差异造成的改动，减少无意义的变更噪音。

changes.title: Added
items: The Unity plugin package now includes a merged Roslyn runtime component to reduce dependency conflicts inside Unity projects.

changes.title: Fixed
items: Fixed Roslyn-related compile conflicts that could appear after installing the Unity plugin in some projects.
Fixed app updates leaving older bundled Unity plugin files in place.
Fixed cases where the Unity embedded window could remain visible after its parent window was hidden, switched, or restored.
Fixed an occasional Unity Editor control-channel mismatch when window sync messages were sent quickly.
Diff previews now ignore changes caused only by Windows/macOS line endings, reducing noisy file changes.
